name: BYOV Vehicle Inspection
description: Comprehensive inspection process for Bring Your Own Vehicle (BYOV) program

steps.title: Exterior Vehicle Inspection
steps.description: Comprehensive examination of vehicle exterior condition

substeps.title: Assess body condition
substeps.description: Check for dents, scratches, rust, or other damage

substeps.title: Evaluate paint condition
substeps.description: Look for fading, chipping, or touch-up work

substeps.title: Test all lights and signals
substeps.description: Verify headlights, taillights, turn signals, and hazards work

substeps.title: Inspect tires and wheels
substeps.description: Check tread depth, wear patterns, and overall condition

substeps.title: Examine windows and windshield
substeps.description: Check for cracks, chips, or visibility issues

substeps.title: Check seat condition and functionality
substeps.description: Test seat adjustments and look for wear or damage

substeps.title: Test electronic systems
substeps.description: Verify radio, AC/heat, power windows, and other electronics

substeps.title: Assess cargo/storage space
substeps.description: Evaluate available space for work equipment and tools

substeps.title: Verify cleanliness standards
substeps.description: Ensure vehicle meets company cleanliness requirements

steps.title: Mechanical Systems Inspection
steps.description: Check mechanical systems and safety features

substeps.title: Inspect engine condition
substeps.description: Check engine bay for leaks, unusual noises, or issues

substeps.title: Test brake system functionality
substeps.description: Verify brakes respond properly and check brake fluid

substeps.title: Check all fluid levels
substeps.description: Verify oil, coolant, windshield washer, and other fluids

substeps.title: Inspect exhaust system
substeps.description: Check for leaks, unusual noises, or emission issues

substeps.title: Verify safety equipment
substeps.description: Confirm presence of spare tire, jack, emergency kit

steps.title: Review Vehicle Documentation
steps.description: Verify all required documentation is current and valid

substeps.title: Verify current registration
substeps.description: Check registration is current and matches vehicle

substeps.title: Confirm adequate insurance coverage
substeps.description: Verify insurance meets company minimum requirements

substeps.title: Check state inspection certificate
substeps.description: Ensure current state inspection is valid

substeps.title: Verify clear title ownership
substeps.description: Confirm technician owns vehicle free and clear

options.label: Vehicle Rejected - Does Not Meet Standards
